name: delegate-team
description: Agentic engineering supersystem. The main plugin installs /mavis-ship orchestrator, mm multi-agent framework, mavis-skill-scaffold, and integrates with the original `dt` gateway CLI. Companion plugins expose individual backends.

plugins.name: delegate-team
plugins.description: Main plugin — installs /mavis-ship orchestrator + mm multi-agent framework + skill-scaffolder + agent-kernel memory + integrations on top of the dt gateway CLI.

plugins.name: dt
plugins.description: The original `dt` CLI — gates Claude Code tasks to backend coders (Codex, MiniMax, Gemini, MetaGPT) with policy + failover.

plugins.name: delegate-team-orchestrator
plugins.description: The /mavis-ship orchestrator in isolation — single skill (no other components).

plugins.name: delegate-team-mmas
plugins.description: Multi-agent team framework — 8 specialized agents, spawn-team.py orchestrator, watchdog.sh, hash-edit.py. Reads shared memory from agent-kernel.

plugins.name: delegate-team-scaffolder
plugins.description: mavis-skill-scaffold — generate properly-structured Mavis skill directories in one shot.

plugins.name: delegate-team-god-agent
plugins.description: God Agent — multi-CLI dispatcher for Codex (codex CLI) and opencode-routed models (qwen, kimi, glm).

plugins.name: delegate-team-minimax-coder
plugins.description: MiniMax-Coder — MiniMax-M3 / M2.7 / M2.7-highspeed backend via the mmx CLI.

plugins.name: delegate-team-vertex-coder
plugins.description: Vertex-Coder — Gemini family backend via the google.genai SDK.

plugins.name: delegate-team-agent-kernel
plugins.description: agent-kernel — local-first memory + governance layer. Shared rules, episodic recall, approval inbox, deterministic policy guard. Vendored @mamdouh/agent-kernel v0.0.5.
